news.headline: US orders non-emergency consular staff in Karachi, Lahore to leave Pakistan

<p>The US State Department said on Wednesday it had ordered non-emergency personnel from US consulates in the cities of Karachi and Lahore and their families to leave Pakistan due to security concerns.</p>

news.headline: Gold climbs over 1pc as widening Middle East war fuels safe‑haven demand
news.summary:
<p>Gold prices rose over 1 per cent on Wednesday, rebounding from a more than one-week low hit in the previous session, as a widening Middle East conflict sent global markets tumbling and supported safe-haven demand.</p>
<p>Spot gold gained 1.4pc to $5,157.30 per ounce as of 04:53
